routes.description: Create account with bcrypt password hashing and JWT issuance
Clear auth cookie and end current session
Upload a document, generate SHA-256 hash, and return fileId + metadata
Verify and timestamp uploaded document by fileId; supports optional third-party placeholder
Restore previous document version and append immutable audit event
List documents including hash, verification status, and audit trail
Return user timeline actions sorted by date with version history, verification, and expiration signals
Generate AI or local-rule guidance for compliance gaps and log interaction
Return AI guidance interaction history for audit review
Return active push/email/SMS placeholder alerts for expiring or missing documents
Update notification state with snooze, dismiss, or act actions
List pre-built report templates (US I-9, Canadian work permits, cross-border)
Compile metadata, timestamps, and verification logs into PDF/CSV/Excel exports
Create report share link with optional password protection
